content_body: Dear Gary, I wanted to share with you how excited the children are about spending the holidays in one of your cabins (homes). As you know this will break our family tradition since the passing of my wife last Christmas morning which is exactly what we all need, especially this year, and possibly for years to come. Allison has shared with me nothing but very flattering comments with regard to her communications with you both on the telephone and in emails. You have made this process for her and my family very pleasant and reassuring. She is a very organized and meticulous young lady and has a plan in place for our trip and our stay in your home. Thank YOU again for your kindness and this opportunity to rent one of your fabulous homes for our family to enjoy the holidays.
title: New Christmas Tradition in Blue Ridge, GA
